subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Lord of Eternity Who, with the Key of His Most Great Name, hath opened and taken possession of the prepared hearts of all peoples [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک قدم را که بمفتاح اسم اعظم ابواب مستعده افئده امم را گشود و تصرف نمود
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Word of God and human limitations, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
